approve-CoreIdentity.prompt: Run the CoreIdentity approval and renewal script. Execute: python Q:/src/local_skills/data_tools/coreidentity-approve.py. This handles both: (1) approving pending entitlement requests from team members, and (2) renewing your own expiring memberships. Report the results summary printed by the script. If the script reports errors connecting to CDP, note that headless Edge may need to be relaunched. IMPORTANT: If any requests show status 'no_approve_button' or 'Card click did not open detail panel', re-run the script once more -- transient CDP rendering can cause false negatives. If failures persist after retry, report the exact request IDs and error status so they can be manually approved.
approve-CoreIdentity.description: Approve pending entitlement requests and renew own expiring memberships daily

approve-FFv2.prompt: Run the FFv2 approval script. The user's extra arguments are: {{EXTRA_ARGS}}. Execute: python Q:/src/local_skills/data_tools/ffv2-approve.py {{EXTRA_ARGS}}. The script auto-detects argument type: no args = approve all directs' pending flights, a number = flight ID, a URL containing featureFlight/ = extract ID, anything else = person name. Report the results summary printed by the script.
approve-FFv2.description: Approve all pending FFv2 flights from directs (daily 9:33pm), or targeted by person/ID/URL
